description_long: This is a rectangular, box-like cabinet or shelf with a semi-transparent dark blue exterior, allowing partial visibility of its internal compartments. The structure features a main open cavity with two distinct internal sections, one of which appears to be a smaller compartment or shelf, and the other a vertical section with a door. The door is solid and opaque, contrasting with the rest of the translucent body, and likely serves as an access point to a storage area. The top and sides are smooth and flat, with the overall design suggesting a modern, utilitarian style suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The cabinet is freestanding and appears to be constructed primarily from plastic or acrylic, with some metallic or composite elements for the door. No visible handles or glass panels are present, and the interior is empty.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a semi-transparent blue body, internal compartments, and a solid door. The design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cavity and two internal compartments, with the solid door visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the separation between the compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cabinet, with the internal structure faintly visible through the translucent material.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the solid door clearly visible and the smaller compartment on the left.
